name: Diablo Jalapeno Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Sterilize jelly jars and lids according to manufacturer's instructions.
2. Carefully remove seeds from green pepper and chilies (Do not touch your eyes). Chop the green pepper into 1/4-inch pieces. Measure 1/2 cup for use in the jelly mixture; reserve the rest for another purpose. Chop jalapenos into 1/4 inch pieces. Measure 1/4 cup.
3. Combine the measured green pepper, jalapeno, sugar, and vinegar in a large saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Continue boiling for one minute, then remove from heat. Allow the mixture to cool for five minutes before proceeding.
4. Stir in pectin and food coloring until fully dissolved.
5. Strain the mixture through a fine strainer to ensure no pieces of peppers remain.
6. Pour the strained liquid into sterilized jars, cover tightly, and store in a cool place for up to six months.
Makes 2 cups.
